title: The Ultimate Guide to B2B Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) Optimization
author: Yogy G.
summary: Learn five actionable strategies to reduce your marketing acquisition costs while scaling lead volume.

content.text: Rather than focusing purely on raw search volume, build your content strategy around high-intent long-tail keywords that signal immediate purchasing intent. Capturing organic searchers looking for solutions reduces reliance on expensive paid channels.

Many companies direct paid search traffic to generic homepages. By creating dedicated landing pages focused on a single call-to-action, you can double conversion rates, directly lowering the cost-per-lead metric.
